action_set_definitions.name: get_intersection_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current traffic state for a specific intersection, including queue lengths for all approaches and the current signal status.

intersection_id.description: The unique identifier of the intersection (e.g., 'INT_HUB_07').

action_set_definitions.name: get_system_infrastructure
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the Roadside Unit (RSU) for static configuration data, including mapping directions to phase IDs, safety timing limits, and system health status.

intersection_id.description: The unique identifier of the intersection.

action_set_definitions.name: set_phase_parameters
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the green light duration for a specific signal phase to control traffic flow.

intersection_id.description: The unique identifier of the intersection.

phase_id.description: The specific phase ID to be updated.

green_duration.description: The duration of the green light in seconds.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_world_model
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the internal environment simulation by a specific time increment to process traffic movement and signal changes.

seconds.description: The number of seconds to simulate (e.g., 120).

state_description.intersections: A list of intersections managed by the model.
